project_type: Next.js 16 App Router marketplace application (Khmer Store V3)
test_framework: No test framework configured - validation is via TypeScript compilation and next build
verification_instructions: 1. Run 'unset NODE_OPTIONS && npx --yes next build' in /projects/sandbox/Khmer-Store. 2. Confirm all 24+ routes compile without errors. 3. Check TypeScript passes with no errors.
setup_instructions: pnpm install in /projects/sandbox/Khmer-Store. .env.local already exists with empty Supabase credentials (app gracefully handles missing Supabase).
environment_constraints: COMMON_DEPENDENCIES network mode. Node.js v22. NODE_OPTIONS must be unset before running next build (proxy-bootstrap.js issue). No Supabase connection available - app must gracefully fallback. No test framework - build success is the validation.
contribution_requirements: Keep all existing Supabase integration working. Do not change database schema or migrations. Maintain graceful fallback when Supabase not configured. Keep dark theme with gold accents.
key_patterns: Server components for data fetching (listing-actions.ts returns data or empty arrays). Client components use 'use client' directive. Styling uses Tailwind CSS v4 with custom CSS variables in globals.css. Colors defined as CSS custom properties. Shadcn UI components in src/components/ui/. Framer Motion animations via ScrollReveal/PageTransition wrappers. Zustand for auth state. File-based routing with App Router route groups.
directory_structure: src/app/ - Next.js App Router pages and routes. src/components/ui/ - Shadcn UI primitives (button, card, input, dialog, etc). src/components/layout/ - Header, Footer, MobileNav. src/components/shared/ - Reusable business components. src/components/animations/ - Framer Motion wrappers. src/components/providers/ - AuthProvider. src/features/ - Feature modules (auth, listings, admin, messages) with actions/ and components/. src/lib/supabase/ - Supabase client helpers. src/stores/ - Zustand stores. src/types/ - TypeScript types. src/config/ - Site config. src/constants/ - Static category data. src/hooks/ - Custom hooks.
